DISCOVERY 301, RE: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT BIZON GROUP INC. TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF JUAN MARTINEZ'S FIRST SET OF GENERAL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories? Employment, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JUAN MARTINEZ', AN INDIVIDUAL, Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories Employment, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

The unopposed motion to compel defendant Bizon Group Inc. to respond to plaintiff Juan Martinez's first set of employment form interrogatories is granted. Defendant shall provide complete, verified, objection-free responses within two weeks and shall pay $1288 in reasonable sanctions.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to Dept. 301 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
